notes: Keeps the popup resource library and complete Enabled list synchronized with Resource Manager changes without restarting DingDong.
Marks project- or task-scoped Skills in Resource Manager, the popup library, and Dynamic so their activation boundaries stay visible.
Accepts GitHub Skill repositories, folders, blob SKILL.md links, and raw SKILL.md links with clearer examples for invalid input.
Lets macOS users reveal the panel by opening DingDong and restores a Command-dragged menu bar icon position across launches.
Fixes Windows tray icon replacement, stale Flutter context menus, and unsupported Share actions.
Documents verified Codex and Claude Code paths separately from implemented but not yet end-to-end verified Agent integrations.
